endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/macAddressPools
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all MAC address pools at a location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/macAddressPools/{macAddressPool}
endpoints.description: Returns the requested MAC address pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{MACADDRESSPOOL}} with a real macaddresspool. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
